name: INPINITY Resource — Aether
description: Aether is the rarest trophy resource in INPINITY Online. Only Diamond blocks at the top of the Pyramid (Row 0) can produce it. Used for pinnacle Infinite City upgrades and ultimate builds.

farmingV2.row_rule: Aether is only produced when it is a Diamond block or in Pyramid Row 0.
farmingV2.claim: Claimed via claimResources. Until claimed, resources are stored on the block.

risk.pirates: Stored resources can be stolen by pirate attacks (up to 9% per day) until claimed.
